TestCase z30Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_elements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_elements, t1.elements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.elements = follow_case_elements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to swap, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: swap first and last elements
    double temp = follow_case.elements[0];
    follow_case.elements[0] = follow_case.elements[follow_case.n - 1];
    follow_case.elements[follow_case.n - 1] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
